name: HERBALIFE LTD.
summary: Herbalife is a global health and wellness company operating for 46 years, selling science-backed nutrition products across 95 markets via a direct-selling model. Products include weight management shakes (Formula 1), targeted nutrition supplements, energy and sports products, and outer nutrition skincare lines. The company distributes through a global network of independent Members who provide personalized coaching and support to consumers.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
